response.justification: Wei Chen is a strong individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators), but this is a Level II people-management role and the resume shows no formal people management or team leadership experience. Technical leadership is implied through staff-level titles, workshops, and mentoring, yet there is no evidence of conducting one-on-ones, performance management, roadmap ownership, or leading organizational change. The mobile experience (iOS/Apple TV) is dated and incidental rather than platform-ecosystem depth.
strengths: Deep hands-on developer tooling experience: test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, and MCP code generators
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated knowledge sharing and mentoring via workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people management experience, a hard requirement (2+ years) for this manager role
No evidence of strategic roadmap planning or leading organizational change at team/org level
Mobile platform exposure is limited and dated (2015-2016 iOS/Apple TV work)

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
No demonstrated org-level leadership or roadmap ownership
